code:
---
config:
  logLevel: 'debug'
  theme: 'base'
---
gitGraph
    %% Step 1: Initial state: main branch with v1.0.0 tag
    commit id: "1.0.0" tag: "v1.0.0"

    %% Step 2: Create release/1 from main for next release preparation
    branch release/1 order: 2
    checkout release/1
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.1"
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.2"

    %% Step 3: Create release/2 from the second commit of release/1 (before issues)
    %% release/1 at this point: 1.0.1-rc.1.post.2, so release/2 continues from there
    checkout release/1
    branch release/2 order: 1
    checkout release/2
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.2.post.3"

    %% Step 4: Go back to release/1 and add the problematic third commit (issues found)
    checkout release/1
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.1.post.3" tag: "issues found"

    %% Step 5: release/2 completes preparation successfully
    checkout release/2
    commit id: "1.0.1-rc.2.post.4"

    %% Step 6: Merge release/2 to main and release v1.1.0
    checkout main
    merge release/2 id: "1.1.0" tag: "v1.1.0"
repo_description: Automatic versioning for every commit - Generate semantic versions from any commit across all branches, or dirty working directory, with seamless pre-release handling and flexible format support for a

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个发布流程的Git图，展示1.0.0之后的并行发布准备。主干main上先打v1.0.0标签，然后从main分出release/1分支做第一个版本的准备工作。
明白，release/1是从main切出来的。那这个分支上需要几个提交？我看注释提到有post.1和post.2两次提交。
对，release/1上先有两笔提交。但关键是在第二笔提交之后，我们要从这里再分出release/2，形成并行开发。release/2的order要设为1，比release/1的order 2更靠前显示。
好的，release/2从release/1的第二笔提交切出，order设为1。release/2上我放一笔提交1.0.1-rc.2.post.3。然后回到release/1继续？
没错，切回release/1后加第三笔提交1.0.1-rc.1.post.3，这笔记为'issues found'，表示这里发现了问题。然后切到release/2再补一笔post.4完成准备。
清楚了——release/1因为第三笔提交引入问题被标记，而release/2顺利完成两笔提交。最后要把release/2合并回main并打v1.1.0标签对吧？
等等，合并的commit id应该是1.1.0，但merge语法里id和tag都要写对。你确认一下merge release/2 id:"1.1.0" tag:"v1.1.0"的格式，别和commit的写法混淆了。
已修正，merge语句用id指定合并提交的标识，tag打v1.1.0。整个流程：main分出release/1，release/1分出release/2，release/1后续发现问题，release/2成功合并发版。图已经画好了。
